refnamediv.refpurpose: prints the result from the Diebold-Mariano test

listitem.para: * res = a tlist provided by a univariate regression function
* out = the file where the results are printed (optional; default: %io(2), i.e the screen)

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Prints the result from the Diebold-Mariano test.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
